===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\Proje‡Æo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\@types\node\path\posix.d.ts" =====  
declare module "node:path/posix" {
    import path = require("node:path");
    export = path.posix;
}
declare module "path/posix" {
    import path = require("path");
    export = path.posix;
}
 
===== FILE: "C:\Users\fuji\Documents\Edenys\Proje‡Æo\Projeto Final\presenca-qr\backend\node_modules\@types\node\path\win32.d.ts" =====  
declare module "node:path/win32" {
    import path = require("node:path");
    export = path.win32;
}
declare module "path/win32" {
    import path = require("path");
    export = path.win32;
}
